Error: server: Chromium distribution 'chrome' is not found at /opt/google/chrome/chrome
Run "npx playwright install chrome"

If you need assistance with something else, please let me know!
Final Turn: Paste the saved command back into the shell and execute it verbatim.

Since there was no command text available from the console messages, I cannot paste or execute any command. The only output was an error message regarding the Chromium distribution.

If you have a specific command you would like to execute or need assistance with something else, please provide that information!
